title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language choice significantly impacts AI team productivity and that static typing, LSP support, and compile-time checking reduce costly runtime errors. The video recommends TypeScript over Python for AI coding due to better error detection and code collaboration with AI tools.
